evidence_quotes.quote: There are several options for publishers to preserve a video Thursday even after the servers have closed down (off-line mode, private servers, etc.) which should always be put in place to ensure that players have access to the core services of the game.
prohibiting publishers from revoking licences paid by users in an arbitrary manner.

paragraphs.text: I think it is important to include among the elements of the Digital Fairness Act the safeguarding of video lights by prohibiting publishers from revoking licences paid by users in an arbitrary manner. There are several options for publishers to preserve a video Thursday even after the servers have closed down (off-line mode, private servers, etc.) which should always be put in place to ensure that players have access to the core services of the game.
